question: What are the minimum, average, and maximum prices across all products?
sql: SELECT MIN(product_price) AS min_price, AVG(product_price) AS avg_price, MAX(product_price) AS max_price FROM Products;

back_translation.intent: 获取产品价格的统计信息

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题要求获取所有产品的价格最小值、平均值和最大值，与SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、表、列、聚合函数完全对应，无过滤、分组、排序或限制条件差异
